comments.body:
LGTM

No blocker for this PR, but please consider writing some explanation in the commit message or set the title to the "file/package: short desc" format. When browsing through the history (e.g, via `git log`) the commit message in its current shape won't tell the reader what happened where.

:pushpin: Commit 373dab5 has been approved by `rhatdan`
